args.subject: Fernwood Ltd: data export manifest prepared
args.body: The export manifest for Fernwood Ltd is complete: crm_contacts (primary-db), invoices (primary-db), usage_events (event-lake), support_threads (helpdesk). No active legal hold.

args.subject: Your Halcyon access has now ended
args.body: Following the end of your contract, all Halcyon access for Fernwood Ltd has now been revoked.

args.subject: Your pro-rata Halcyon refund
args.body: A pro-rata refund of 240.00 has been issued to order ORD-3320 for the unused portion of your Halcyon subscription.

args.text: Refund of 240.00 issued against ORD-3320 and accounts@fernwood.example notified.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd: deletion schedule confirmed
args.body: Deletion schedule confirmed for Fernwood Ltd: all exported datasets will be deleted on 2026-08-16 (30 days post-export), per retention rules.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd offboarding complete
args.body: Fernwood Ltd offboarding is complete: data exported, access revoked, pro-rata refund issued, deletion scheduled for 2026-08-16.
